brand.name: FIRSTSPAWN
brand.description: The infrastructure for reliable voxel multiplayer discovery. We prioritize performance data over paid placements.

bottom.copyright: © {year} FirstSpawn. Not affiliated with Hypixel Studios or Mojang.

cookieConsent.title: COOKIE SETTINGS
cookieConsent.introPrefix: Our website uses essential cookies and limited technical data to keep FirstSpawn secure, maintain your session, remember language preferences, and protect core platform functionality.
cookieConsent.introSuffix: about how these settings affect your experience.
cookieConsent.consentPrefix: With your permission, FirstSpawn may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the platform, improve discovery flows, and make ranking, trust, and onboarding systems more reliable. See our
cookieConsent.consentSuffix: for more detail. Analytics providers may act as
cookieConsent.essentialDescription: Required for account security, session continuity, language settings, and the basic operation of the platform. These remain enabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Helps us measure traffic, understand feature usage, and improve product decisions without turning discovery into paid placement.
cookieConsent.manageDescription: With your permission, FirstSpawn may use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the platform and to improve discovery, trust, and onboarding systems. Essential cookies remain enabled because they support the secure and reliable operation of the site.
cookieConsent.categoryUnavailable: Personalization and marketing cookies are not currently active on FirstSpawn.

scene.alt: A dusk overworld vista with a spawn overlook, beacon tower, ruined portal arch, scanning signal trails, and the FirstSpawn scout familiar surveying the route ahead.

questBoard.title: PICK YOUR NEXT SERVER QUEST
questBoard.subtitle: Start with live Minecraft discovery, checked uptime, and a fair ranking loop that does not sell the top slot.

quests.title: FIND A WORLD
quests.description: Search active server listings by player count, ping, region, and game mode without paid placement noise.

quests.title: VERIFY THE SIGNAL
quests.description: Use freshness and uptime checks to avoid dead listings before you spend time joining.

quests.title: BUILD REPUTATION
quests.description: Reviews, favorites, badges, and loot loops are being shaped as the next trust layer.

items.title: SERVER DISCOVERY
items.description: Browse public Minecraft server listings and open the full discovery view.

items.title: UPTIME CHECKS
items.description: Use live freshness signals to avoid dead or stale server listings.

items.title: PLAYER REPUTATION
items.description: Earned reviews, favorites, badges, and trust signals are the next player loop.

problemSolution.title: DISCOVERY: REDEFINED
problemSolution.subtitle: We did not just build a better server list. We engineered a definitive protocol to fix a decade of bot-driven stagnation.

items.title: SYNTHETIC VANITY
items.description: Rankings built on bribes and bot-loops. Synthetic metrics that mask a server's true pulse.

items.title: ROTTING ARCHITECTURE
items.description: Static phonebooks for ghosts. Disconnected directories that have not evolved since 2012.

items.title: DEEP-PULSE INTEGRITY
items.description: FSVotifier-backed reputation. Real-time metrics that prove community health and trust.

items.title: NEURAL DISCOVERY
items.description: A living bridge. We connect players directly to the hidden gems that matter.

discoveryFork.title: DISCOVERY: REDEFINED
discoveryFork.subtitle: One platform. Two parallel worlds. Choose your uplink.

player.title:
NEURAL
DISCOVERY
player.description: Find hidden gems through deep-pulse playtime metrics and community reputation.

host.title:
INTELLIGENCE
HUB
host.description: Access real-time growth heatmaps and precision player demographics.

trust.title: RANKED BY SIGNAL, NOT SPEND
trust.subtitle: The page should feel like a game, but the ranking rules stay serious.

items.title: LIVE FRESHNESS
items.description: Server status is derived from recent heartbeat activity, so offline worlds do not pretend to be active.

items.title: NO TOP-SLOT SALES
items.description: FirstSpawn is built around relevance and trust loops instead of buying the most visible listing.

items.title: PLAYER-FIRST FILTERS
items.description: Discovery starts with what players actually need: active communities, latency, version, and server fit.

serverProof.title: SERVER PROOF WITHOUT FAKE HYPE
serverProof.subtitle: When catalog data is available, the board shows real listings. When it is not, it says so clearly.
serverProof.emptyDescription: No public servers are available from the API right now. Discovery is still the primary path, and this panel will populate from live catalog data as targets come online.

progression.title: PROGRESSION THAT EARNS TRUST
progression.subtitle: Gamification is planned as proof of useful activity, not cosmetic noise.

items.title: VERIFIED BADGES
items.description: Future badges should mark real uptime, owner verification, and community behavior.

items.title: REPUTATION LADDER
items.description: Player actions can become earned trust signals once review and activity gates are ready.

items.title: LOOT LOOP
items.description: Rewards should bring players back to discover better communities without distorting ranking fairness.
